stemHtml: An aircraft’s call sign is RUSHAIR 123. In the cruise, the pilots receive the CPDLC message "CLIMB TO FL410". A few seconds later, they receive the following radio transmission: "RUSHAIR 123 DISREGARD CPDLC CLIMB MESSAGE, BREAK, CLIMB FLIGHT LEVEL 380." What should they do?

options.a: Disregard the CPDLC instruction, read back the radio transmission and climb to FL380.
options.b: Disregard the voice transmission, read back the radio transmission and climb to FL410.
options.c: Send "STANDBY" via a CPDLC message and wait for further instructions.
options.d: Send "WILCO" via CPDLC and climb to FL410.
